SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.utils

Class ParsedItem

java.lang.Object
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.utils.ParsedItem
public class ParsedItem extends Object
The ParsedItem class parses and represents custom item metadata from an ItemStack.

This class is responsible for reading and writing custom component data embedded in the item meta, using a custom format. It provides methods to load, read, and modify values in a structured manner.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ParsedItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack)
    Constructs a ParsedItem from an ItemStack.

    Converts this ParsedItem to an ItemMeta using the Bukkit item factory.

  • Constructor Details

    • ParsedItem

      public ParsedItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack)
      Constructs a ParsedItem from an ItemStack.
      Parameters:
      itemStack - the item stack to parse.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the itemStack or its meta is null.

    • loadMap

      public static Map<String,Object> loadMap(Map<String,Object> data, String path)
      Loads or creates a map at the specified path.
      Parameters:
      data - the data map.
      path - the key to retrieve.
      Returns:
      the map at the given path.

    • readNamespacedKey

      public static org.bukkit.NamespacedKey readNamespacedKey(Map<String,Object> data, String path, org.bukkit.NamespacedKey defValue)
      Reads a NamespacedKey from the data at the specified path.
      Parameters:
      data - the data map.
      path - the key to retrieve.
      defValue - the default value if the key is not found.
      Returns:
      the NamespacedKey or the default value.

      Reads a NamespacedKey from the data at the specified path.
      Parameters:

      path - the key to retrieve.
      Returns:
      the NamespacedKey or null if not found.

    • load

      public String load(@Nullable @Nullable String defValue, String... paths)
      Loads a string value from the components. If not found, set the default value.
      Parameters:
      defValue - the default string value.
      paths - the nested keys defining the path.
      Returns:
      the loaded string value.

    • toItemStack

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack toItemStack()
      Converts this ParsedItem back to an ItemStack using the Bukkit item factory.
      Returns:
      the resulting ItemStack.

      public org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta toItemMeta()
      Converts this ParsedItem to an ItemMeta using the Bukkit item factory.
